2604.19516.title: From Experience to Skill: Multi-Agent Generative Engine Optimization via Reusable Strategy Learning
2604.19516.paper_summary: Generative engines (GEs) are reshaping information access by replacing ranked links with citation-grounded answers, yet current Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) methods optimize each instance in isolation, unable to accumulate or transfer effective strategies across tasks and engines. We reframe GEO as a strategy learning problem and propose MAGEO, a multi-agent framework in which coordinated planning, editing, and fidelity-aware evaluation serve as the execution layer, while validated editing patterns are progressively distilled into reusable, engine-specific optimization skills. To enable controlled assessment, we introduce a Twin Branch Evaluation Protocol for causal attribution of content edits and DSV-CF, a dual-axis metric that unifies semantic visibility with attribution accuracy. We further release MSME-GEO-Bench, a multi-scenario, multi-engine benchmark grounded in real-world queries. Experiments on three mainstream engines show that MAGEO substantially outperforms heuristic baselines in both visibility and citation fidelity, with ablations confirming that engine-specific preference modeling and strategy reuse are central to these gains, suggesting a scalable learning-driven paradigm for trustworthy GEO. Code is available at https://github.com/Wu-beining/MAGEO
2604.19516.paper_summary_zh: 生成引擎（GEs）正在改變資訊獲取的方式，通過用基於引用的答案取代排名鏈接，然而目前的生成引擎優化（GEO）方法在孤立中優化每個實例，無法在任務和引擎之間累積或轉移有效策略。我們將GEO重新定義為一個策略學習問題，並提出MAGEO，一個多代理框架，其中協調規劃、編輯和考慮忠實度的評估作為執行層，而經過驗證的編輯模式逐步提煉為可重用的引擎特定優化技能。為了實現受控評估，我們引入了雙分支評估協議，用於內容編輯的因果歸因，以及DSV-CF，一個將語義可見性與歸因準確性統一的雙軸指標。我們進一步發布MSME-GEO-Bench，一個基於現實查詢的多場景、多引擎基準。對三個主流引擎的實驗顯示，MAGEO在可見性和引用忠實度方面顯著超越啟發式基準，消融實驗確認引擎特定的偏好建模和策略重用是這些增益的核心，這表明了一種可擴展的以學習為驅動的可信GEO範式。代碼可在 https://github.com/Wu-beining/MAGEO 獲得。
2604.19516.author: Beining Wu et.al.
2604.19516.authors: Beining Wu, Fuyou Mao, Jiong Lin, Cheng Yang, Jiaxuan Lu, Yifu Guo, Siyu Zhang, Yifan Wu, Ying Huang, Fu Li
